title: Bloodstatic for deira
description:
Bloodstatic – Alternative Metal Outfit for VRChat / Anime Style

Stylized female outfit designed for anime-inspired characters, VRChat avatars, and general 3D rendering projects.

This outfit features a cropped black t-shirt with a bold red extreme-metal inspired graphic across the chest, creating a striking contrast that immediately draws attention. The relaxed fit and slightly oversized sleeves give the design a casual streetwear appearance while maintaining a dark alternative aesthetic.

The look is paired with low-rise denim shorts featuring visible stitching, metal rivet details, and layered waist straps that add depth and personality to the outfit. The combination of distressed-inspired denim elements and dark accessories creates a balanced blend of metal, grunge, and modern alternative fashion.

Designed to capture a rebellious yet stylish appearance, this outfit is ideal for alternative avatars, music-themed characters, showcases, social VR environments, and customizable anime-style models.

Perfect for VRChat avatars, stylized renders, character customization, and alternative fashion enthusiasts.

Technical Details





Compatible with the Deira Base



Deira Base model is not included



No blendshapes included



4,437 Vertices



3 Material Slots



Ready for Unity



Optimized for VRChat / Unity / Blender

PBR-ready materials



Clean topology suitable for real-time applications

title: SnowFox set For Deira
description:
Stylized Casual Set - VRChat / Anime Style

Stylized female outfit designed for anime and VR-style characters, suitable for VRChat avatars and general 3D rendering.

This outfit features a clean, minimal crop top with a high-neck design and soft blue trim accents that frame the chest and neckline, creating a fresh and modern look. The top is designed to sit snugly on the torso, emphasizing a smooth and stylized silhouette.

The set is completed with low-rise shorts featuring matching blue accents, belt details, and functional-style seams that add a casual yet polished aesthetic. The overall design feels light, cute, and contemporary, making it ideal for everyday avatar use while maintaining an anime-inspired style.

Perfect for stylized avatars, casual renders, showcases, and customizable character models.

title: Kitten Set Cute For Deira
description:
Cute / kawaii style clothing set, designed specifically for the Deira body base.

Includes a short bandeau-style top in black with a cute cat face design on the front, complemented by thin straps that give it a delicate and stylish look. The bottom piece is a simple black underwear-style garment, featuring a decorative paw print on the back and cat ears on the front, maintaining an adorable overall aesthetic.

The mesh is highly optimized, with 2,347 vertices, making it ideal for use in VRChat and other real-time environments. The object includes only the clothing; the body base is not included.

It does not contain blendshapes, allowing for a clean and flexible workflow for adjustments or customization.

Dependencies

Poiyomi toon shader

title: SK Manager (ShapeKey Transfer & Mixer)
description: SK Manager is a production-focused tool for Blender designed to streamline work with shape keys. It enables precise transfer of blendshapes between meshes with identical topology using vertex delta data, avoiding common issues found in traditional methods. It also includes a mixing system that allows multiple shape keys to be combined into a single one, with full control over each shape's influence, making it easy to create complex expressions or optimize rigs. Built for speed, consistency, and non-destructive workflows, it is a practical solution for artists working with characters, avatars, and animation.
